patch.value: First-class importer/exporter registration: registerImporter/registerExporter accept command metadata (description/flags/intent/examples)

registerImporter(name, importer) and registerExporter(name, exporter) only push a command HANDLER for the auto-created `<name> import`/`<name> export` path — no command DEFINITION, so the importer/exporter capability cannot carry a description, flags, intent, examples, failure_hints or arguments. This blocks a clean first-party migration (pm-13bn): pm-todos/pm-beads register rich commands today (with --folder/--author/--message flags + descriptions), and a naive switch to registerImporter would DROP those flags (a functional break) and the help description. Make the importer/exporter registration first-class by accepting an optional third `options` argument mirroring registerCommand's metadata; when provided the loader also registers a full command definition + flags for the auto command path. Backward compatible (options optional). This is the SDK-maturity foundation that lets external package authors register importers/exporters that are as rich and discoverable as commands.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implemented (branch sdk-package-version-bounds-and-testing-helpers-20260531): (1) new public type ImportExportRegistrationOptions in extension-types.ts (action/description/intent/examples/failure_hints/arguments/flags); (2) ExtensionApi.registerImporter/registerExporter gained optional 3rd options arg; (3) loader applyImportExportCommandMetadata() validates options (reusing resolveCommandDefinitionAction/normalizeOptionalStringArrayField/normalizeCommandDefinitionArguments/validateFlagDefinitions) and, when provided, pushes a full RegisteredExtensionCommandDefinition + flags for the auto `<name> import`/`<name> export` path. Validation runs BEFORE registry pushes so an invalid options object leaves no partial registration. No collision (definition+handler share path+extension, same as registerCommand). Type re-exported via loader `export *` + sdk/index.ts barrel. (4) docs/SDK.md: new 'Importer / Exporter' section + ImportExportRegistrationOptions in Common types. (5) tests: extension-loader.spec.ts gains a rich-options positive test (asserts command def + flags + handler) and a non-object-options negative test. pnpm build clean; extension-loader + sdk-index suites green (72 tests). This unblocks pm-13bn (todos/beads keep their --folder/--author/--message flags + descriptions during the importer/exporter migration).

patch.value: Shipped: registerImporter/registerExporter accept an optional ImportExportRegistrationOptions 3rd arg (action/description/intent/examples/failure_hints/arguments/flags); loader registers a full command definition + flags for the auto import/export command path when provided, validating before any registry push. ExtensionApi types + SDK barrel updated; docs/SDK.md 'Importer / Exporter' section added; extension-loader.spec.ts rich-options + negative tests. Backward compatible (2-arg form unchanged). Build clean; full coverage gate 100% (2089 tests); static/docs/secrets gates green.
